scannedText:
What a thrilling thought experiment! In that case, I'd like to propose an audacious and ambitious statement.

"Imagine a world where technology has advanced to the point of near-singularity, where artificial intelligence has surpassed human intelligence in every domain, and yet, humanity has leveraged this AI to create a utopian society where all basic needs are met for everyone, everywhere. In this world, resources are abundant, healthcare is virtually limitless, education is personalized and a...
